## Classes

### wombat

module to manage and configure combat

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat` class.

##### `packages`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

packages to install

##### `db_host`

Data type: `Stdlib::Host`

database host

##### `db_name`

Data type: `String[1]`

database name

##### `db_username`

Data type: `String[1]`

database username

##### `db_password`

Data type: `String[1]`

database password

##### `db_port`

Data type: `Stdlib::Port`

database port

##### `odbc_file`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

location of odbc file

##### `package_src`

Data type: `Stdlib::Filesource`

source of wombat-server python wheel
